opportunity.title: Pilot a brand-safe buying agent
opportunity.thesis: Public capital is chasing agentic buying. Narrow to premium Kargo inventory.
opportunity.whyItMatters: Agents may bypass classic DSP UIs over the next cycle.
opportunity.move: Internal spike: NL plan → Kargo inventory with safety guardrails.
recommendedActions: Guardrails: safety, format fit, attention floors

evidence.title: Underscore AI raises $28M Series A for agentic bidding
evidence.summary: Capital influx into LLM-based bidding agents suggests next-wave optimization stacks may bypass traditional DSP UI workflows.
evidence.rawExcerpt: Underscore AI closed a $28M Series A to build autonomous media-buying agents that negotiate goals in natural language…

evidence.title: Trade Desk hiring 12 ML Engineers for “Kokai Decisioning”
evidence.summary: Cluster of senior ML roles referencing real-time decisioning, feature stores, and advertiser goal translation—signals continued Kokai investment.
evidence.rawExcerpt: Build and productionize models that translate advertiser objectives into bid / budget decisions within the Kokai platform…

competitors.name: Underscore AI
competitors.summary: Early-stage agentic bidding infra; watch for talent and partnership moves that could leapfrog incumbent DSPs.

competitors.name: The Trade Desk
competitors.summary: Largest independent DSP pushing AI-driven optimization (Kokai) and identity (UID2) across CTV and open web.

learnings.title: Agents will buy media in plain language
learnings.lesson: Public Series A capital is chasing autonomous buying agents.
learnings.quickWin: Spike a brand-safe agent that only proposes Kargo premium inventory.

confidenceBreakdown.note: Public sources only. Confidence = corroboration across independent marked sources.
